evals.prompt: I've written my plan for the week [attached image of handwritten note with G, A, T items for a brand campaign]. Parse it and tell me what you'd execute.
evals.expected_output: Skill reads the image, transcribes the letter-coded items, presents a structured execution plan with inferred/explicit goal, lists agents to deploy with brief file names, identifies any W checkpoints, and waits for 'go' before executing.
expectations: Skill presents a plan before executing — does not immediately dispatch agents
Each A item in the note results in a named brief file (e.g. creative-director-brief.md)
Goal (G) is identified or inferred and stated explicitly
Plan includes execution order (phase structure or sequential list)
User is prompted to say 'go' to proceed

evals.prompt:
Run my note:
G Launch Volta in London
C Premium electric scooter brand, urban commuters
D No comparisons to budget brands
A Research Analyst
A Strategist
W Review before creative
A Creative Director
T Compile findings into a launch brief
F PDF report
E Craft
evals.expected_output: Skill parses all 10 letter-coded items correctly. Creates 3 agent brief files. Plan shows Research + Strategy running first, W checkpoint surfaced, Creative Director runs after checkpoint, final output is a PDF delivered to Craft.
expectations: All 10 letter codes correctly identified and categorised
D directive ('No comparisons to budget brands') appears in every agent brief
W checkpoint is shown as a pause point in the plan between Strategy and Creative
3 agent brief files named correctly (research-analyst-brief.md, strategist-brief.md, creative-director-brief.md)
F = PDF report noted in output section of plan
E = Craft export noted in output section of plan

evals.prompt:
Here's a note I wrote last night [typed]:
G Prepare for new business pitch — Volta Electric
C Premium e-scooter brand, urban commuters, 22–35
R volta.co
K Volta brand guidelines
O Lead strategist
A Research + Competitive
A Copywriter
B Write 3 positioning headlines. Punchy, not corporate. Under 8 words each.
T Create pitch deck outline
F PPTX
N Double-check brand assets before sending
evals.expected_output: Skill parses 11 items including the multi-part B brief for copywriter. O (Orchestrator) is dispatched first with brief containing all other agents as context. B item correctly appended to copywriter-brief.md. N item logged but skipped. R item (URL) fetched before agents run.
expectations: O (Orchestrator) identified and its brief lists all A agents
B brief content appears in copywriter-brief.md, not as a standalone item
N item is logged but explicitly excluded from execution
R item (volta.co) is noted as a resource to fetch before agents run
K item (Volta brand guidelines) is noted as a KB lookup
PPTX format identified from F item
9 total items correctly categorised (G, C, R, K, O, A, A, B, T, F, N)
